messages.content: read src/index.ts and tell me what it does

The `src/index.ts` file is the main entry point of the TinyCode application. It handles command-line arguments, sets up the application, and runs either in one-shot mode or interactive mode.

In one-shot mode, it takes a prompt as an argument, runs the prompt through the `runAgent` function, and prints the result to the console.

In interactive mode, it launches a text-based user interface (TUI) using the `render` function from the `ink` library and the `App` component from `./tui/app.js`.

The file also includes error handling and support for setting the model variant using the `--model` command-line option.
